sentence_reviews.text: Neural architecture search optimizes network topology, operations, width, depth, routing, or hardware placement with evolutionary, reinforcement, differentiable, or surrogate-based search.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken, Metzen & Hutter survey NAS search spaces, search strategies including evolutionary/RL/gradient-based methods, and performance-estimation strategies; AIMA/RL references support general search and RL background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The NAS survey directly supports optimizing architectures/search spaces with evolutionary, reinforcement-learning, differentiable/gradient, and surrogate/performance-estimation methods.

sentence_reviews.text: It can discover architectures tuned to accuracy, latency, memory, energy, or device constraints.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken, Metzen & Hutter survey NAS search spaces, search strategies including evolutionary/RL/gradient-based methods, and performance-estimation strategies; AIMA/RL references support general search and RL background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The NAS survey covers optimizing architecture for performance and efficiency constraints, including hardware-aware/efficient architecture search.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken, Metzen & Hutter survey NAS search spaces, search strategies including evolutionary/RL/gradient-based methods, and performance-estimation strategies; AIMA/RL references support general search and RL background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Cell-based search spaces are directly covered in NAS literature.

sentence_reviews.notes: Hardware-aware and supernet/one-shot search are covered in NAS literature.

sentence_reviews.text: Search is expensive, proxy tasks can mislead, and reported gains may depend on narrow spaces or evaluation leakage.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken, Metzen & Hutter survey NAS search spaces, search strategies including evolutionary/RL/gradient-based methods, and performance-estimation strategies; AIMA/RL references support general search and RL background.
sentence_reviews.notes: NAS survey literature discusses high cost and proxy/evaluation issues; leakage wording is a broader synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: Neural architecture search uses AutoML & automated model design as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_reviews.notes: NAS is a major AutoML subfield.

sentence_reviews.notes: Evolutionary search is a core NAS strategy.

sentence_reviews.notes: NAS is an optimization/search problem, though the exact Optimization theory dependency is taxonomic.

edge_reviews.notes: NAS is directly situated inside AutoML/automated model design.
Evolutionary NAS is a core search family.
RL-based NAS is a standard, but not exclusive, method family.
Architecture search is an optimization problem; common strength is reasonable.
